session.user: Run the ty type checker on the project and report results. Command: ty check --project /home/runner/work/erk/erk 2>&1 | head -100
session.assistant: I'll run the ty type checker on the project for you.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ty type checker on project

session.tool_result:
error[invalid-argument-type]: Argument to bound method `update_local_ref` is incorrect --> src/erk/cli/commands/pr/dispatch_helpers.py:49:59 | 48 | user_output(f"Syncing {trunk} with origin/{trunk}...") 49 | ctx.git.branch.update_local_ref(repo.root, trunk, remote_sha) | ^^^^^^^^^^ Expected `str`, found `str | None` 50 | user_output(click.style("✓", fg="green") + f" {trunk} synced with origin/{trunk}") 51 | elif merge_base == remote_sha: | info: Element `None` of this union is not assignable to `str` info: Method defined here --> packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/git/branch_ops/abc.py:282:9 | 281 | @abstractmethod 282 | def update_local_ref(self, repo_root: Path, branch: str, target_sha: str) -> None: | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ --------------- Parameter declared here 283 | """Update a local branch ref to point at a new commit without checkout. | info: rule `invalid-argument-type` is enabled by default
Found 1 diagnostic
session.assistant:
ty failed: 1 diagnostic found
**Location:** src/erk/cli/commands/pr/dispatch_helpers.py:49:59
**Error type:** invalid-argument-type
**Message:** Argument to bound method `update_local_ref` is incorrect. Expected `str`, found `str | None`
**Issue:** The `remote_sha` variable is `str | None`, but the `update_local_ref()` method requires a `str` argument. The code needs to handle the case where `remote_sha` could be `None` before passing it to this method.
